case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT. INC. VS. LESLIE VIDAURRETA ET AL

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $271.90 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 67294053) AS TO DEFENDANT VIDAURRETA, LESLIE

AS TO DEFENDANT VIDAURRETA, LESLIE DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-18-2022

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT. INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIDAURRETA, LESLIE $1,301.59 PRINCIPAL, $271.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,573.49, SEE SCANNED DOC
